title: Non-record: SwiGLU + EMA + AdamW TTT + EBLS Findings (val_bpb=1.1746 on H100 NVL)
body:
## Summary

- **Post-quant BPB:** 1.1746 (standard sliding window eval, stride=64)
- **Artifact:** 15.9 MB (code: 53,610 + weights: 15,848,738)
- **Hardware:** 8xH100 NVL (170ms/step, 3,547 steps). On SXM (~91ms/step), would reach ~6,100 steps and ~1.15 BPB.

## Changes from base

Built on thwu1 #180 (which built on unnir #162):

1. **SwiGLU MLP** replacing ReLU-squared (swiglu_mult=2.0, same param count as mlp_mult=3.0)
2. **EMA** (decay=0.9985) replacing SWA
3. **Eval-time AdamW TTT** on MLP weights (10 steps per sliding window, weights restored after each window)
4. **Mixed int5/int6 quantization** with 5% magnitude pruning

## EBLS Exploration Findings

We also explored Empirical Bayes Layer Sharing (3 shared blocks x 3 virtual layers with per-layer LoRA deviations gated by learned shrinkage gammas). Three findings:

1. **MLP-vs-attention asymmetry:** MLP gammas converge to 0.0000 (fully shared), attention retains trace specialization (0.001-0.005) in early layers only. MLP computation is more layer-invariant than attention.

2. **LoRA rank threshold:** At rank 8, all gammas -> 0. At rank 16, gammas stabilize at 0.01-0.05. The model chooses not to deviate when deviation capacity is insufficient.

3. **Quantization error amplification:** Shared weights applied N times compound floating-point noise through the residual stream. 0.19 BPB gap between torch.compile and eager mode in depth-recurrent architectures that doesn't exist in standard architectures.

## Statistical perspective on TTT

TTT is posterior adaptation where pretrained weights are the prior and AdamW provides adaptive shrinkage — parameters with high gradient variance get less adaptation, matching the James-Stein principle that shrinkage should be proportional to estimation uncertainty.

## Credits

thwu1 #180, unnir #162, felipe-parodi (EMA), sjp611 (AdamW TTT)

## Full writeup

See companion repository: [parameter-golf-ebls](https://github.com/Robby955/parameter-golf-ebls)
